creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
I see a problem again with multimedia/mplayer on recent 13-CURRENT (FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #43 r342666: Tue Jan  1 09:25:45 CET 2019 amd64). The problem seems to have resurfaced around 15th December 2018 (a guess).

Port multimedia/mplayer has been recompiled with "portmaster -f" as well as devel/glib20. No effect!
